target.title: Doctor: add lint profiles
target.body:
What Problem This Solves
- Doctor now has warning-level checks that are intentionally excluded from the default `doctor --lint` automation gate because they are deeper or more likely to surface repairable legacy residue.
- Before this PR, those checks were discoverable only by exact `--only <check-id>` selectors, which is too hidden for operators who want the complete lint inventory.

Why This Change Was Made
- Adds `openclaw doctor --lint --lint-profile default|full`.
- Keeps `default` as the existing automation-safe selection.
- Lets `full` include default-disabled checks without changing finding severity, finding schemas, repair behavior, or the plugin SDK health contract.
- Leaves `--only <id>` as the precise selector for individual checks.

User Impact
- Existing `doctor --lint` users keep the same broad-lint behavior.
- Operators and maintainers can run `doctor --lint --lint-profile full` to include opt-in/deep checks such as the config audit scrub check from #84450.
- This is a CLI/docs contract addition only; no config, plugin, or SDK contract expansion.

Evidence
- Rebased after #84450 merged; current PR diff is only the lint-profile slice.
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts --reporter=dot` - passed, 33 tests / 3 shards.
- `node_modules\.bin\oxfmt.CMD --check src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts docs/cli/doctor.md docs/gateway/doctor.md` - passed.
- `node_modules\.bin\oxlint.CMD src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts` - passed.
- `pnpm tsgo:core` - passed.
- `pnpm tsgo:test:src` - passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` - passed.
- `pnpm docs:list` - passed.

Real Behavior Proof
- Environment: source CLI from this branch, isolated temp `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` and `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH`, with one seeded `logs/config-audit.jsonl` record containing a fake pre-redactor `--api-key` argv value. Paths below are redacted.

```text
--- default profile ---
command: node scripts/run-node.mjs doctor --lint --json
exit: 1
checksRun: 23
checksSkipped: 2
configAuditFindingCount: 0
--- full profile ---
command: node scripts/run-node.mjs doctor --lint --json --lint-profile full
exit: 1
checksRun: 25
checksSkipped: 0
configAuditFindingCount: 1
configAuditFinding: warning core/doctor/config-audit-scrub 1 entry in config-audit.jsonl still contain pre-redactor argv values. path=<TEMP>\openclaw-lint-profile-proof\state\logs\config-audit.jsonl
```

- The non-zero exit in both runs is expected because the isolated empty config also produces unrelated default-lint warnings such as missing gateway mode/auth. The proof target is the selection behavior: default profile skips the opt-in config-audit check, while `full` includes it.
target.author: giodl73-repo
